title: CreateTableAsyncFromTimeTravelRequest
description: Request body for creating a table from a time travel source. Some parameters are optional or only used for specific backends.

sourceTableId.description: ID of the source table for time travel.

timestamp.description: Timestamp for time travel (ISO8601 or unix timestamp).

columns.description: List of table columns (optional, only for file workspace).

timestampType.description: Type of internal timestamp column only MANAGED value now supported, meaning that _timestamp column managed by storage is created.
